x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Incentive
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Provides a direct cash reward or credit to the customer for meeting certain conditions.

Comment:
Example: A $50 cash bonus for opening a new savings account or making a first deposit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Points Incentive
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Points / Reward-Based Incentive: Customers earn loyalty points, reward credits, or benefits for performing predefined activities.

Comment:
Example: Earning 1,000 points for using a credit card for $500 in spending.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Incentive
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Interest / Rate-Based Incentive: Offers enhanced interest rates, cashback rates, or yield benefits as a reward.

Comment:
Example: A higher savings account interest rate for customers maintaining a balance above $10,000.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Waiver Incentive
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Reduces or eliminates fees for certain services as a reward for customer behavior.

Comment:
Example: Waiving annual maintenance fees for credit cards or account services after meeting transaction targets.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Non-Monetary Incentive
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Non-Monetary / Benefit-Based Incentive: Offers exclusive privileges, perks, or services instead of direct monetary reward.

Comment:
Example: Priority customer support, concierge services, or access to special events.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Promotional Incentive
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Promotional / Campaign-Based Incentive: Provides temporary rewards linked to specific campaigns or marketing promotions.

Comment:
Example: Double points during a festive season or limited-time bonus for new product adoption.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered Incentive
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tiered / Milestone Incentive: Rewards are structured based on reaching milestones or loyalty tiers.

Comment:
Example: Unlocking higher rewards levels after spending $5,000, $10,000, etc., within a program year.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Referral Incentive
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Referral / Network Incentive: Rewards customers for referring new clients or encouraging product adoption.

Comment:
Example: Earning $25 or bonus points when a referred friend opens an account.
